title: Stands Like a Bastion
summary: Your armor, along with your size, strength, incredible training, or machine enhancement, makes you difficult to move or hurt.
tiers: Tier 3: Greater Enhanced Might or Practiced With All Weapons
Tier 6: Lethal Damage or Shield Training
Tier 6:Break the Ranks or Not Dead Yet
Tier 3: Bigger Animal Shape or Greater Beast Form
Tier 6: Blurring Speed or Lend Animal Shape
gm_intrusions: The character unexpectedly changes form. An NPC is frightened by or aggressive toward the shapeshifter. The transformation takes longer than expected.
text: Your armor, along with your size, strength, incredible training, or machine enhancement, makes you difficult to move or hurt. (Some characters who Stand Like a Bastion might already be experts in armor. They can choose a different tier 1 ability instead of Practiced in Armor.) STRETCHES Your body is elastic and rubbery, able to stretch to great lengths and compress when struck. TAKES ANIMAL SHAPE You can transform yourself into an animal. Greater Beast Form applies to using Animal Shape.
details: Your armor, along with your size, strength, incredible training, or machine enhancement, makes you difficult to move or hurt.
(Some characters who Stand Like a Bastion might already be experts in armor. They can choose a different tier 1 ability instead of Practiced in Armor.)
Your body is elastic and rubbery, able to stretch to great lengths and compress when struck.
You can transform yourself into an animal.
Greater Beast Form applies to using Animal Shape.
